cxu_object.claim: In trending market regimes the optimal strategy is trend following entering on pullbacks in the direction of the prevailing trend with maximum position size and exiting only when the trend clearly reverses with confirmed sign change and acceleration

supporting_contexts.text: Trend Following: entry on pullbacks in trend direction (price trend >±0.2%). Exit when trend reverses with clear sign change plus acceleration. Performance: +$6 to +$55 depending on period, best in sustained uptrends.

Regime-adaptive playbook for TRENDING UP or TRENDING DOWN: follow the trend with max size (1.0). Enter on pullbacks not breakouts. Hold until reversal is confirmed by price action not by signal noise.

pullbackEntryPct.description: Minimum pullback percentage before entering in trend direction

reversalThresholdPct.description: Counter-trend move percentage that confirms reversal

maxTradesPerDay.description: Maximum number of entries per day in trending regime

trailingStopPct.description: Trailing stop loss percentage from high watermark

version.change_description: Initial trending playbook from regime-adaptive strategy results
